package models

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"os"

	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

// Anti-pattern: AfterCreate hook performs external I/O — an HTTP POST to a
// webhook URL and writing a file to disk. Model hooks should never perform
// network calls or file system operations.

type Order struct {
	ID     uint    `gorm:"primaryKey"`
	UserID uint    `gorm:"column:user_id"`
	Total  float64 `gorm:"column:total"`
	Status string  `gorm:"column:status"`
}

func (o *Order) AfterCreate(tx *gorm.DB) error {
	// External HTTP call inside a model hook.
	payload, _ := json.Marshal(map[string]interface{}{
		"event":  "order.created",
		"order_id": o.ID,
	})
	http.Post("https://hooks.example.com/orders", "application/json", nil)
	_ = payload

	// File I/O inside a model hook.
	os.WriteFile("/tmp/order_created.log", []byte("order created"), 0644)

	return nil
}
